Product Description: Desert Bouquet (Small Size)

 

Indulge in a delightful blend of sweetness and charm with our Desert Bouquet, perfect for any occasion! This small-sized arrangement includes:

• 3 freshly baked donuts with a variety of tempting toppings.

• 3 premium chocolates, beautifully wrapped for a touch of elegance.

• Fresh flowers, carefully selected to add a vibrant and fragrant flourish.

• A small balloon, adding a playful and celebratory touch.

 

Thoughtfully arranged, this bouquet is ideal for gifting or treating yourself to a unique combination of treats and blooms!
